title: Mortality Analysis by Age, Gender, and Race
collect_instructions: Collect the columns BIRTHDATE, DEATHDATE, RACE, and GENDER from the patients.csv file.
chart_instructions: Create a histogram showing the distribution of mortality by Age groups (calculated from BIRTHDATE and DEATHDATE). Create grouped bar charts showing the mortality rate segmented by Race and Gender.
report_instructions: Report the overall mortality rate, and provide segmented mortality rates and counts broken down by Race, Gender, and Age groups.
